name: Agent Runtime — AgentCore
description: Deploys a Bedrock AgentCore runtime with an invocable endpoint, IAM roles, X-Ray tracing, and CloudWatch log delivery. The managed runtime runs your agent container with auto-scaling and built-in Bedrock model access.

resources.name: AgentCore Runtime
resources.description: Managed container runtime for your agent

resources.name: IAM Role + Policies
resources.description: Least-privilege role with Bedrock, ECR, CloudWatch, X-Ray permissions

resources.name: CloudWatch Log Group
resources.description: Vended log delivery for application logs

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Project name used in resource naming (lowercase, hyphens)

parameters.name: container_image_uri
parameters.description: ECR image URI for the agent container

parameters.name: model_id
parameters.description: Bedrock model ID for IAM policy scoping

parameters.name: environment_variables
parameters.description: Environment variables passed to the agent container

parameters.name: enable_cross_region_inference
parameters.description: Allow cross-region model inference via inference profiles
